title: Natural Blues
meaning_summary: Natural Blues still generates long-tail value because it blends Moby's sample-driven identity with strong emotional clarity and sync potential.
revenue_drivers: The Play catalog still drives ongoing streaming and rediscovery.
Its emotional framing gives it durable sync and mood-playlist value.
Creator-side control likely supports better artist economics than a typical legacy recording.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate infers current annual earnings from continued streaming, sync utility, and stronger-than-average creator-side participation.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split between label-controlled rights and meaningful creator-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears materially tied to writer-side interests
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is assumed here
ownership.notes: This is an inferred gross-to-net range based on current catalog behavior, not a public royalty statement.
